summary: Mobile animation testing completed successfully. All mobile viewport, navigation animations, page transitions, and CSS animations are working correctly on FaceConnect PWA.

minor.issue: 422 errors on several API calls - may be validation issues with session/auth

passed_tests: Bottom navigation items visible with data-testid attributes (nav-home, nav-search, nav-create, nav-reels, nav-messages)
Bottom navigation tap animations work (whileTap scale 0.9 with spring stiffness 400, damping 25)
Create button has scale/rotate animation on tap (whileTap scale 0.85, rotate 90)
Page transitions between Home, Explore, Reels, Messages work smoothly with AnimatePresence
Navigation active indicator dot animates correctly (spring stiffness 500, damping 30)
Mobile CSS animations file loads correctly (mobile-animations.css)
Spring easing CSS variable working (--mobile-easing-spring: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1))
Bounce easing CSS variable working (--mobile-easing-bounce: cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55))
Mobile pop-in animation class works (animationName: mobile-pop-in, duration: 0.25s)
Create menu modal opens with slide-up animation showing Post, Story, Reel, Live, Scan, AI options
critical_code_review_comments: mobile-animations.css: Comprehensive GPU-accelerated animations with 600+ lines of mobile-optimized CSS
PageTransition.jsx: Uses framer-motion with multiple variants (default, slideRight, slideLeft, scale, slideUp, fade)
BottomNav.jsx: Properly implements spring animations using framer-motion with stiffness/damping config
Active indicator dot uses AnimatePresence for enter/exit animations
Badge notifications have pop-in animation (scale: 0 to 1 with spring stiffness 500)
Touch feedback implemented with mobile-tap and mobile-press CSS classes
Safe area insets supported for notched devices
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile animations are fully implemented and working. Key files: mobile-animations.css (CSS animations), PageTransition.jsx (framer-motion page transitions), BottomNav.jsx (nav animations with spring physics). Test user: testcaller@test.com / TestPass123!. Bottom nav has data-testid attributes: nav-home, nav-search, nav-create, nav-reels, nav-messages.
